sql_array: CREATE TABLE asinh_test (value Float64, result Float64);
INSERT INTO asinh_test (value, result) VALUES (0, asinh(0));
INSERT INTO asinh_test (value, result) VALUES (1, asinh(1));
UPDATE asinh_test SET result = asinh(value) WHERE value > 0;
SELECT value, result FROM asinh_test WHERE result BETWEEN -1 AND 1;
